MORTGAGE AND BORROWING RATES

Back to all rates

MORTGAGE AND BORROWING RATES

Our latest mortgage offers

The current Meridian Prime Rate is 4.45% as of October 30, 2025.

APR stands for Annual Percentage Rate and reflects the total cost of borrowing for a mortgage, including interest and fees such as appraisals. We show both the mortgage rate and APR to help you see the impact of these fees. Where no fees apply, the two rates are the same.

4.79% (4.81% APR1)

Fixed-rate mortgage

5-Year Closed

Apply now

4.49% (4.51% APR1)

Fixed-rate mortgage

5-Year Closed High Ratio2

Apply now

3.59%  (3.61% APR1)

Variable-rate mortgage

5-Year Closed High Ratio2

Apply now

Book and appointment to discuss your options with an advisor

Fixed rate mortgages1

Special offers
5-Year Closed (special offer) 4.79% 4.81% APR1
5-Year Closed High Ratio2 (special offer) 4.49% 4.51% APR1
3-Year Closed (special offer) 4.69% 4.72% APR1
3-Year Closed High Ratio2 (special offer) 4.29% 4.32% APR1

 

Posted rates
6-Month Convertible 7.84% 7.98% APR1
1-Year Open 8.00% 8.10% APR1
1-Year Closed 6.09% 6.19% APR1
2-Year Closed 5.74% 5.79% APR1
3-Year Closed 6.54% 6.57% APR1
4-Year Closed 6.19% 6.22% APR1
5-Year Closed 6.49% 6.51% APR1
7-Year Closed 6.89% 6.90% APR1
10-Year Closed 6.99% 7.00% APR1

Learn about fixed-rate mortgages

APR stands for Annual Percentage Rate and reflects the total cost of borrowing for a mortgage, including interest and fees such as appraisals. We show both the mortgage rate and APR to help you see the impact of these fees. Where no fees apply, the two rates are the same.

Variable-rate mortgages1

5-Year Closed 3.89% (Prime - 0.56%) 3.91% APR1
5-Year Closed High Ratio2 3.59% (Prime - 0.86%) 3.61% APR1
5-Year Open 6.45% (Prime + 2.00%) 6.47% APR1
Learn more about variable-rate mortgages

APR stands for Annual Percentage Rate and reflects the total cost of borrowing for a mortgage, including interest and fees such as appraisals. We show both the mortgage rate and APR to help you see the impact of these fees. Where no fees apply, the two rates are the same.

Lines of credit3

 

Meridian LOC Prime Rate is 4.95% | Meridian Prime Rate is 4.45%

Secured/Home Equity Line of Credit (HELOC) 4.95% (LOC Prime) Apply now
Flex Line Mortgage / HELOC 4.95% (Prime + 0.50%)
Student Line of Credit 5.95% (LOC Prime + 1.00%)
Unsecured Line of Credit   Based on application
Learn more about loans and lines of credit

Borrowing resources and information

Affordability calculator

Payment calculator

Refinance calculator

Around here, starting your mortgage journey is simple.

Whether you’re in the market for a new mortgage or looking to renew, switch, or refinance, we can help.

Book an appointment

1On approved credit. Rates subject to change without notice. Annual Percentage Rate (APR) assumes blended monthly payments based on a $300,000 mortgage, 25-year amortization for the term and a $300 fee associated with determining the value of the property. If there are no fees, the APR and interest rate will be the same. Interest is compounded half-yearly for fixed rates, and monthly for variable rates, not in advance. If there are no fees, the APR and interest rate will be the same. Additional premiums may apply in cases of extended amortizations, non-owner occupied, or other instances where application details may warrant it. The interest rate with variable rate mortgages will fluctuate with Meridian Prime Rate, which is currently 4.45%. Where applicable, the Bank of Canada qualifying rate is 5.25%. Builder's pricing applies to posted rates, not to promotional or special rates. For commercial mortgage rates, please speak to your Commercial Relationship Manager.

2A High Ratio mortgage is applicable in cases where a borrower places a down payment of less than 20% when purchasing a residential property with a purchase price of under $1,500,000. The borrower must also be eligible for and purchase mortgage default insurance and meet all applicable conditions. Renewals are ineligible. For a purchase price of $500,000 or less, the minimum down payment is 5%. When the purchase price is above $500,000 and under $1,500,000, the minimum down payment is 5% for the first $500,000 and 10% for the remaining portion. Mortgage Rates are applicable to Retail Members Only.

3Interest is calculated daily, not in advance, on the outstanding closing balance of the principal sum borrowed and charged monthly. Minimum payment equivalent to monthly interest charged. Additional premiums may apply in instances where application details may warrant it. The Line of Credit interest rate is a variable rate and will fluctuate based on Meridian Prime and LOC Prime. Meridian Prime Lending rate: 4.45% Meridian LOC Prime Lending rate: 4.95%. Some conditions apply. Rates subject to change without notice. Initial fees may apply.

We use cookies to ensure that we give you the best experience on our website.

You’re in control. Choose your cookie settings.

A "cookie" is a small text file that's stored on your computer, smartphone, tablet, or other device.  When you visit a website, a cookie distinguishes you from other users. Cookies are used for many reasons including security, fraud prevention, site performance, and personalization.

Read our Cookie Policy
Always active

Persistent cookies are stored on your device between browsing sessions until they expire, (30 days or more), or, until you delete them.  Persistent cookies enable the website to recognize you and your preferences upon your return.

Active Disabled

Session cookies expire when you leave the website or log out of online banking. Session cookies allow the website to recognize you as you move between website pages during a browsing session. Third-party cookies are a type of session cookie that enable companies like Facebook and Pinterest to provide content that is relevant to your specific interests. 

Use the toggles to choose which specific cookies you wish to enable or disable. 

Google Analytics
Pinterest
Facebook
Google Adsense
Glassbox
